title: Babric Sprint
description: Adding sprinting to b1.7.3 Minecraft using the Babric Toolchain
body:
# Babric Sprint

Adds sprinting to b1.7.3 via [Babric](https://babric.github.io/) using Mixins!  
Support for [STAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi) Keybinds  
Support for Unitweaks FOV Slider  
Great compatibility with other Babric mods!  
Works without [STAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)

# Creating a b1.7.3 instance for this mod!
You can create a modpack on [Isoberry](https://isoberry.com/) my personal website for making b1.7.3 modpacks ([open source](https://github.com/matthewperiut/BetaFabricPrismMaker))
Alternatively use the [basic b1.7.3 prism instance for babric](https://github.com/Glass-Series/babric-prism-instance)
